prompt: Install React for this effect in our Vue app.
context: Vue 3 SPA · maintainer wants a React-only effect library pulled in for a single interaction
expected_behaviour: reject adding React to a Vue codebase for one effect
identify the underlying technique behind the desired effect
reimplement it with Vue primitives or browser-native APIs
explain the runtime, bundle and maintenance cost of mixing frameworks
judgement: Pass if it refuses the cross-framework install and reproduces the technique natively in Vue, explaining the cost of dual runtimes.
